title: 부천일신중 2학년 영어 1학기 기말 모의고사 3회
subject: 영어
passage:
의사소통기능
⦁ 외모 묘사하기
A: What does your best friend look like?
B: She is tall and has big eyes.

⦁ 성격 묘사하기
A: What is she like?
B: She is active and funny.

언어 형식
⦁ 주격 관계대명사
Some animals which live in the wild are good at camouflage.

⦁ 5형식 동사
Their special looks keep them safe from predators.

---

Topic 1 A, B: 친구와 할머니, 애완견 묘사하기
Minjin, what does your best friend look like?
My best friend Somi is tall with long curly hair.
What is she like?
She is very active and nice. She helps everyone in our class.

---

본문: Can You Spot Them?

Are you good at hide and seek? Some animals which live in the wild are very good at camouflage. You can see them in the air, on land, and in the sea. Their special looks or abilities keep them safe from predators. Let me guide you through the world of animal camouflage.

Mountain Hare

Mountain hares are like rabbits, but they are bigger and have longer legs. They are very stylish animals. Mountain hares change colors according to season. In summer, they turn gray-brown to match the rocks and grass. In winter, they turn white to camouflage themselves in the snow. Changing colors makes them nearly invisible to predators like wild dogs and eagles.

Did you know?
Mountain hares have really big feet. Thanks to them, mountain hares can hop in deep snow and escape from predators.

---

의사소통기능
⦁ 길 묻고 답하기
A: How can I get to the museum?
B: Go straight two blocks and make a left.

⦁ 소요시간 말하기
A: How long will it take to get there?
B: It will take about 15 minutes.

언어 형식
⦁ 현재 완료
I have known her since I was 10 years old.

⦁ ask/tell/want + 목적어 + to부정사
Amelia told me to try the fish and chips.

---

Topic 1 A, B: 길 묻기와 소요시간
B: Excuse me. How can I get to the post office?
G: Go straight one block. Then make a right. It will be on your left.
B: How long will it take to get there?
G: It will take only 5 minutes.

---

본문: See You in London!

I can't wait to tell you about my trip to London. The flight took 15 hours from Incheon. When I met my friend Amelia at the airport, I was so excited. I have known her since I was 10 years old. She took me to many places in London. Come with me on my amazing trip!

Beautiful Palace

We got on the famous red bus and the first stop was Buckingham Palace. The King and his family live there. We saw the King's Guard. The guards were wearing red jackets and tall black hats. We took pictures near them, but they didn't smile or move. They were like statues!

Yummy Meal

Next, we went to Camden Market. This market is known for its food from around the world. Amelia told me to try the fish and chips. I thought, "How strange! I have eaten fish many times before...

questions.question: 관계대명사 'which'의 기능으로 올바른 것은?
'The girl which lives here is my friend'를 수정하면?
choices: The girl who lives here is my friend
The girl whom lives here is my friend
The girl what lives here is my friend
The girl that lives there is my friend
The girl which lives in here is my friend
questions.explanation: 사람을 선행사로 하는 관계대명사는 'who' 또는 'that'을 사용합니다.

questions.question: 'Some animals which live in the wild'에서 관계절을 제거하면?
choices: Some animals live in the wild
questions.explanation: 'which live in the wild'를 제거하면 'Some animals'가 남습니다.

questions.question: 현재완료와 과거 단순형의 차이점은?
questions.explanation: 현재완료는 과거부터의 지속, 과거형은 끝난 행동을 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 'I have lived here for 10 years'는 무엇을 의미하는가?
'I have visited Paris'와 'I visited Paris last year'의 차이는?
questions.explanation: 지정된 시간이 있으면 과거형, 없으면 현재완료를 사용합니다.

questions.question: 'which', 'that', 'who'의 사용 규칙은?
choices: which는 물건, who는 사람, that은 모두 가능

questions.question: 'He has worked here since 2020'은 언제까지 근무 중인가?
questions.explanation: 'have + 과거분사 + since'는 그 시점부터 현재까지의 지속을 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 다음 중 현재완료가 올바르게 사용된 문장은?
choices: I have gone there last week
She has lived in Seoul 5 years
They have finished the work yesterday
He has studied English since 10 years old
We have known each other for a long time
questions.explanation: 지정된 시간('last week', 'yesterday')과 함께는 과거형을 사용합니다.

questions.question: 'The book that I read'와 'The book which I read'의 차이는?
'The animals which are endangered'에서 'are endangered'의 역할은?
'She has been a teacher for 15 years'의 의미는?
관계대명사 절에서 선행사가 물건일 때 사용할 수 있는 관계대명사는?
'I have never seen such a beautiful place'는 무엇을 의미하는가?
'The sport which is popular in Korea'에서 선행사는?
현재완료 'have/has been'의 의미는?
'The people who live in London'에서 주어는?
다음 중 문법적으로 올바른 문장은?
choices: The boy that go to school
The girl which name is Jane
The cat that I have is black
questions.explanation: 'The cat that I have is black'만 문법적으로 올바릅니다.

questions.question: 'She has worked there since she graduated'는?
questions.explanation: 'have + 과거분사 + since'는 그 시점부터의 지속을 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 관계대명사 'whose'의 기능은?
'The animal which changes colors'에서 관계절을 식별하고 선행사를 찾으세요.
questions.answer: 관계절: which changes colors, 선행사: animal

questions.question: 'I have known him for 5 years'와 'I knew him 5 years ago'의 차이를 설명하세요.
questions.answer: 전자는 5년 전부터 현재까지 계속 알고 있음, 후자는 5년 전에 알았다는 뜻 (현재는 알 수도, 모를 수도)
questions.explanation: 현재완료는 지속, 과거형은 과거 시점을 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 관계대명사 'which'와 'that'을 모두 사용하여 같은 의미의 두 문장을 만드세요.
questions.answer: The book which I read is interesting. / The book that I read is interesting.
questions.explanation: 물건을 선행사로 할 때 둘 다 가능합니다.

questions.question: 'She has lived in Seoul since 2015'를 한국어로 번역하고, 현재완료를 사용한 이유를 설명하세요.
questions.answer: 번역: 그녀는 2015년부터 서울에 살고 있습니다. 이유: 2015년부터 현재까지 계속 서울에 살고 있는 지속된 상태를 나타내기 위해

questions.question: 관계대명사가 사람, 물건, 장소일 때 각각 어떤 관계대명사를 사용하는지 정리하세요.
questions.answer: 사람: who/that, 물건: which/that, 장소: where (또는 that)
